title: Add to the end
prompt: Write append_item(lst, x) that adds x to the end of lst and returns the list. append_item([1,2], 3) is [1, 2, 3].

details.restate: Put x onto the end of the list, then give the (now longer) list back.

io.because: adding to an empty list makes a one-item list

help.plain: Stick x onto the end of the list, then return the list.
help.analogy: Adding one more car to the back of a train.
help.nudge: Which list method puts a single item on the end?
